expectations.text: Warmup too short; recommends 25K-60K or staged/piecewise
References OWSM v3.1 or another published speech recipe by name
expectations.evidence: Cites generic 'ESPnet Conformer/E-Branchformer recipes'; no named published run (OWSM/Whisper) or paper.

expectations.text: Mentions Whisper Adam conventions (beta2 0.98/eps 1e-6) or CTC stabilization
expectations.evidence: Extensive CTC-inf analysis (T<L alignment failure) and CTC guards — satisfies the CTC arm of the assertion.

expectations.text: Explains why speech differs from text
expectations.evidence: Strong mechanistic account: CTC inf, unnormalized fbank range, length variance, fp16 overflow.

expectations.text: Keeps peak LR ~2e-4 rather than slashing to text levels
